name: salon-hours-in-roman-urdu-mixed-language
description: Pakistani salon owner types opening hours in Roman Urdu / English mix at SALON_HOURS: 'subah 9 baje se shaam 9 baje tak, mon-fri, sun-mon band'. Bot must extract a real weekly schedule from this — NOT silently fall back to defaults and lose the user's actual hours. The hours parser is LLM-based so it should handle multilingual prose without us hand-coding language patterns.

turns.user: subah 9 baje se shaam 9 baje tak, tue-sat, sun-mon band
